about.title: About GymBuilder
about.subtitle: The platform that connects gym owners with the best equipment suppliers in Europe.
about.missionText: GymBuilder was created from a passion for fitness and the desire to simplify the complex process of equipping a gym. We connect gym owners with verified suppliers, offering transparency, comparison, and personalized support.
about.visionText: To become the reference platform in Europe for commercial fitness equipment — a place where every gym owner finds exactly what they need, at the best price, from trusted suppliers.
about.valueTransparencyDesc: Clear prices, complete specifications, real reviews.
about.valueQualityDesc: Only verified suppliers and commercial-grade equipment.
about.valueSupportDesc: Personalized consultation and assistance at every stage.
about.valueInnovationDesc: Modern digital tools for planning the perfect gym.
about.teamText: We are a team of professionals from the fitness and technology industry, dedicated to transforming how gyms get equipped.
about.ctaText: Explore our catalog or request a personalized consultation.

contact.title: Contact

contact.successMessage: Thank you for your message. We will respond within 24 business hours.
contact.consultDesc: If you need personalized help planning or equipping your fitness facility, our team of consultants can guide you.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.s1Text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device (computer, phone, tablet) when you visit a website. They allow the site to recognize your device and retain certain information about your visit, such as language preferences or authentication status.
cookiePolicy.s2_1Text: These cookies are essential for the website to function. Without them, basic functionalities such as authentication, page navigation, and access to secure areas would not be possible. They do not require consent as they are essential for providing the requested service.
cookiePolicy.s2_2Text: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the site, providing information about pages visited, time spent on the site, and any errors encountered. Data is anonymized and aggregated. They are only activated with your explicit consent.
cookiePolicy.s2_3Text: Currently, GymBuilder does not use marketing or advertising cookies. If we implement such cookies in the future (for retargeting, personalized ads, etc.), this policy will be updated and you will be notified through the consent banner.
cookiePolicy.s3Intro: You have several options for managing cookies:
cookiePolicy.s3List:
• Consent banner: On your first visit, you can choose between "Accept all" (also activates analytics cookies) or "Essential only" (blocks non-essential cookies).
  • Browser settings: You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies. Consult your browser's documentation for specific instructions.
  • Clearing consent: You can delete the site's local data (localStorage) from your browser settings to reset your cookie preference.
cookiePolicy.s3Note: Note: Blocking essential cookies may affect the proper functioning of the site (for example, you will not be able to stay logged in).
cookiePolicy.s4Text: The use of essential cookies is based on our legitimate interest in providing a functional service (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR). Analytics and marketing cookies are based on your explicit consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR), in accordance with the requirements of the ePrivacy Directive (2002/58/EC) transposed into Romanian legislation through Law No. 506/2004 on the processing of personal data and the protection of privacy in the electronic communications sector.
cookiePolicy.s5Text: Some service providers (for example, Vercel for hosting and analytics) may process data outside the European Economic Area (EEA). In these cases, transfers are protected by Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission or other GDPR-compliant transfer mechanisms.
cookiePolicy.s6Intro: Under GDPR, you have the right to:
cookiePolicy.s6List:
• Withdraw consent at any time (by deleting local data from your browser)
  • Request information about data collected through cookies
  • Request deletion of data associated with cookies
  • File a complaint with the National Supervisory Authority for Personal Data Processing (ANSPDCP)
cookiePolicy.s7Text: This policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. The date of the last update is displayed at the beginning of the page. We recommend that you check this page periodically.
cookiePolicy.s8Text: For any questions regarding the use of cookies on GymBuilder, you can contact us at:

returnPolicy.title: Return / Cancellation Policy
returnPolicy.s1Intro: This policy applies to all paid services offered through the GymBuilder platform, including:
returnPolicy.s1List:
• Promotion packages for suppliers (Professional, Enterprise)
  • One-time promotions (Deal of the Day, Daily Listings)
  • Consultation services for planning and equipping fitness facilities
returnPolicy.s1Note: GymBuilder is a marketplace platform that facilitates the connection between equipment suppliers and current/future gym owners. Direct equipment transactions between suppliers and buyers are subject to each supplier's own policies.
returnPolicy.s2Text: In accordance with OUG 34/2014 on consumer rights in contracts concluded with professionals (transposition of Directive 2011/83/EU), you have the right to withdraw from the contract within 14 calendar days from the date of purchase, without having to give a reason and without incurring costs other than those provided by law.
returnPolicy.s2BoxList:
• For promotion packages — from the date of payment confirmation
  • For one-time promotions — from the date of payment confirmation
  • For consultation — from the date of booking confirmation
returnPolicy.s3Title: 3. Exceptions to the right of withdrawal
returnPolicy.s3Intro: In accordance with Art. 16 of OUG 34/2014, the right of withdrawal does not apply in the following situations:
returnPolicy.s3List:
• Fully executed services — if the service has been fully performed and execution began with the consumer's prior express consent and acknowledgment that they lose their right of withdrawal once the contract is fully executed.
  • Already published promotions — if the promotion (Deal of the Day, Daily Listing) has already been displayed on the platform according to the agreed schedule, the service is considered executed.
  • Consultation performed — if the consultation session has taken place (fully or partially) with the consumer's consent.
returnPolicy.s3Important: Important: When purchasing any service, you will be explicitly informed if execution begins within the withdrawal period and your express consent will be requested, in accordance with the law.
returnPolicy.s4Intro: To exercise your right of withdrawal, you must inform us by an unequivocal statement (e.g., email) of your decision to withdraw from the contract.
returnPolicy.s4Steps:
• Send an email to contact@gymbuilder.app with the subject "Contract withdrawal"
  • Include in the email: full name, email address associated with the account, purchased service, purchase date, and transaction number (if available)
  • You will receive an acknowledgment of receipt within 24 business hours
  • The refund is processed within a maximum of 14 days from receiving the request
returnPolicy.s5Text: In case of valid exercise of the right of withdrawal, we will refund all amounts paid, including delivery costs (if applicable), without undue delay and in any case within 14 calendar days from the date we were informed of your decision to withdraw.
returnPolicy.s5List:
• The refund is made using the same payment method used for the initial transaction (bank card via Stripe)
  • No additional fees are charged for processing the refund
  • If the service was partially executed (with your consent) before withdrawal, you will owe a proportional amount for the services provided up to the time of withdrawal
returnPolicy.s6Intro: Recurring monthly promotion packages can be cancelled at any time:
returnPolicy.s6List:
• Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period
  • Package benefits remain active until the paid period expires
  • No pro-rata refunds are made for the remaining period of the current month
  • You can reactivate the subscription at any time
returnPolicy.s7Intro: In accordance with the Annex to OUG 34/2014, you may use the following template (completing and submitting this form is not mandatory):
returnPolicy.s7Form2: I/We [your name] hereby notify my/our withdrawal from the contract for the provision of the following service: [service description]
returnPolicy.s8Intro: In case of disagreements, we encourage you to first contact us at contact@gymbuilder.app for an amicable resolution.
returnPolicy.s8Alt: If a solution is not reached, you can appeal to:
returnPolicy.s9Intro: For any questions regarding returns, cancellations, or refunds:

blog.comingSoonDesc: We're preparing articles about choosing equipment, gym planning, industry trends, and expert tips. Subscribe to our newsletter to be notified.

terms.s1Text: By accessing and using the GymBuilder.app platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you do not have permission to access the service.
terms.s2Text: GymBuilder is a B2B platform that connects fitness equipment suppliers with gym owners and sports centers. The platform offers product listing services, consultation, and transaction facilitation.
terms.s3Text: To use certain features of the platform, you must create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password and for restricting access to your computer.
terms.s4Text: Suppliers who list products on the platform guarantee that they have the legal right to sell those products and that the information provided is correct and complete. GymBuilder reserves the right to verify and approve suppliers.
terms.s5Text: Certain platform features require a paid subscription. Prices are displayed on the pricing page and may be changed with 30 days' notice.
terms.s6Text: GymBuilder is not responsible for direct transactions between suppliers and buyers. The platform serves only as an intermediary to facilitate business connections.
terms.s7Text: For questions regarding these terms, you can contact us at:

privacy.s1Text: We collect information that you provide directly: name, email address, phone number, company information, and other data necessary for the operation of your account.
privacy.s2Text: We use the collected information for: providing and improving services, communicating with you, processing transactions, and personalizing the platform experience.
privacy.s3Text: We do not sell personal information to third parties. We may share information with: service providers who help us operate the platform, business partners in the context of platform transactions, and authorities when required by law.
privacy.s4Text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal information against unauthorized access, modification, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy.s5Text: We use cookies to improve the site experience, analyze traffic, and personalize content. You can control cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.s6Text: You have the right to: access personal data, rectification of inaccurate data, erasure of data, restriction of processing, data portability, and objection to processing.
